name: pulse-threads
description: P.U.L.S.E Threads content engine untuk personal brand Lawrence Philemon — intake performa, baseline analysis, dan produksi batch konten Threads (pilar asuransi + digital marketing).

interface.shortDescription: Intake, baseline analysis, dan batch produksi konten Threads
interface.longDescription: Threads growth strategist + copywriter untuk personal brand Lawrence Philemon. Menjalankan protokol P.U.L.S.E: Performance intake, Uncover baseline (median-based), Leverage mechanics (algoritma Threads 2026), Script content (hook bank 8 pola + voice kakak protektif), Evaluate & loop. Termasuk compliance asuransi non-negotiable dan self-check sebelum deliver.
defaultPrompt: $pulse-threads jalankan intake untuk batch konten minggu ini
